entity_evidence.text: The Director of Finance may adjust amounts in any appropriation item, or in any category thereof, as a result of changes from amounts budgeted for the employers' contributions for prefunding other postemployment benefits for the 2025-26 fiscal year to achieve the percentages specified in this subdivision.

entity_evidence.text: The Director of Finance shall notify the Controller by executive order of adjustments made pursuant to subdivision (c).
